risks.title: Duplicate event monitoring detected
risks.evidence: 4 events for same file (Security.tsx) with 2 exact timestamp duplicates (19:02:39.029-030Z, 19:02:22.476-477Z). Tags explicitly mark 'duplicate-event' and 'duplicate'.
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate monitoring/event ingestion pipeline for deduplication logic or timestamp precision issues. May indicate observer misconfiguration.

risks.title: Security file modified without context
risks.evidence: Multiple high-relevance (0.95, 0.85) events show Security.tsx changes, but event payloads lack details on what changed or why.
risks.recommendedAction: Review actual diff of Security.tsx changes and correlate with any related commits or tickets before approving merge.

opportunities.title: Automate security test execution on Security.tsx changes
opportunities.evidence: Events suggest Security.tsx is actively modified; security tag indicates intentional monitoring for such changes.
opportunities.suggestedAction: Wire Security.tsx modifications to trigger automated security and unit tests in CI/CD pipeline.

opportunities.title: Implement event deduplication in monitoring system
opportunities.evidence: Consistent near-duplicate timestamps suggest timing precision or event batching issues in observer.
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add deduplication filter (by source, file, timestamp window) to reduce noise and improve signal quality.

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx code changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine diff of recent modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx and verify security implications. Cross-reference with any associated PRs or tickets.
taskCandidates.rationale: Multiple high-relevance monitoring events confirm active changes to security-sensitive file; manual review is warranted before proceeding.

taskCandidates.title: Verify and run security test suite
taskCandidates.description: Execute security and unit tests related to Security.tsx to ensure modifications don't introduce vulnerabilities or break existing functionality.
taskCandidates.rationale: Security file modifications warrant automated validation before merge; events explicitly tag security review as suggested action.

taskCandidates.title: Debug event duplication in monitoring system
taskCandidates.description: Investigate why identical events are generated with near-identical timestamps; verify observer configuration and event processing pipeline.
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events reduce monitoring signal quality and may mask real issues; root cause should be identified.

recommendations.title: Establish security file review workflow
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is clearly under active development with multiple recent changes. Without a formal review process, risk of unintended vulnerabilities increases.
recommendations.action: Define approval rules for Security.tsx changes (e.g., require security team review, automated test passage, threat modeling for significant changes).

recommendations.title: Consolidate and deduplicate monitoring events
recommendations.rationale: Current event stream contains redundant duplicates that waste processing resources and obscure actual changes.
recommendations.action: Implement deduplication logic in event ingestion layer; ensure one-event-per-meaningful-change principle.

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx code changes
